violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed to go containers on the floor adn pizza boxes being stored on the floor.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Need to have Quat test strip as that is sanitizer that is currently being used.

Prep/vegetable sink. — --Designated prep sink was not provided or not used for food items requiring washing/soaking. Establishment replaced flooring during the winter months and has not put a new prep sink in.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
